g.text: dual-trust window: both the old and the new CA are trusted (finite)
Runbook step 1: add the new CA as a second Bundle source
Runbook step 3: remove the old source
[the agent rebuilt both pools inside the window]
Starter templates watch $KAALM_CA_CERT and rebuild both pools on change, which makes this
transparent. Custom images carry the same obligation: the inbound server rebuilds ClientCAs via a
tls.Config.GetConfigForClient callback returning a config with the fresh pool, and the outbound
HTTP client rebuilds RootCAs. A CA-bundle change MUST rebuild both.
